resources.string: execute arbitrary commands within &TERMUX_APP_NAME; environment and access files

Installing bootstrap packagesâ€?/string> Unable to install bootstrap &TERMUX_APP_NAME; was unable to install the bootstrap packages. Abort Try again &TERMUX_APP_NAME; can only be run as the primary user. \nBootstrap binaries compiled for &TERMUX_APP_NAME; have hardcoded $PREFIX path and cannot be installed under any path other than:\n%1$s. &TERMUX_APP_NAME; cannot be installed on portable/external/removable sd card on your device. \nBootstrap binaries compiled for &TERMUX_APP_NAME; have hardcoded $PREFIX path and cannot be installed under any path other than:\n%1$s.
New session Failsafe Max terminals reached Close down existing ones before creating new.
Set session name Set New named session Create
Keyboard
Enabling Terminal Toolbar Disabling Terminal Toolbar
Select URL Click URL to copy or long press to open No URL found in the terminal. URL copied to clipboard
Share transcript Terminal transcript Send transcript to:
Share selected text Terminal Text Send selected text to:
Autofill username Autofill password
Reset Terminal reset
Kill process (%d) Really kill this session?
Style Keep screen on Help Settings
Report Issue Generating Report Add termux debug info to report?
The &TERMUX_STYLING_APP_NAME; Plugin App is not installed. Install
Exit Acquire wakelock Release wakelock
&TERMUX_APP_NAME; requires \"Display over other apps\" permission to start terminal sessions from background on Android >= 10. Grants it from Settings -> Apps -> &TERMUX_APP_NAME; -> Advanced Invalid execution command runner to TermuxService: `%1$s` Unsupported execution command runner to TermuxService: `%1$s` Unsupported execution command shell create mode to TermuxService: `%1$s` Shell name not set but `%1$s` shell create mode passed
Invalid intent action to RunCommandService: `%1$s` Invalid execution command runner to RunCommandService: `%1$s` Mandatory extra missing to RunCommandService: \"%1$s\" Visit %1$s for more info on RUN_COMMAND Intent usage.
Save file in ~/downloads/ Edit Open directory
Failed to start TermuxService. Check logcat for exception message. Failed to start TermuxService while app is in background due to android bg restrictions.
&TERMUX_APP_NAME; Settings
&TERMUX_APP_NAME; Preferences for &TERMUX_APP_NAME; app
Debugging Preferences for debugging
Logging
Log Level
Terminal View Key Logging Logs will not have entries for terminal view keys. (Default) Logcat logs will have entries for terminal view keys. These are very verbose and should be disabled under normal circumstances or will cause performance issues.
Plugin Error Notifications Disable flashes and notifications for plugin errors. Show flashes and notifications for plugin errors. (Default)
Crash Report Notifications Disable notifications for crash reports. Show notifications for crash reports. (Default)
Firebase Crashlytics Disable automatic crash collection to Firebase. Enable automatic crash collection to Firebase.
Terminal I/O Preferences for terminal I/O
Keyboard
Soft Keyboard Enabled Soft keyboard will be disabled. Soft keyboard will be enabled. (Default)
Soft Keyboard Only If No Hardware Soft keyboard will be enabled even if hardware keyboard is connected. (Default) Soft keyboard will be enabled only if no hardware keyboard is connected.
Terminal View Preferences for terminal view
View
Terminal Margin Adjustment Terminal margin adjustment will be disabled. Terminal margin adjustment will be enabled. It should be enabled to try to fix the issue where soft keyboard covers part of extra keys/terminal view. If it causes screen flickering on your devices, then disable it. (Default)
&TERMUX_API_APP_NAME; Preferences for &TERMUX_API_APP_NAME; app
&TERMUX_FLOAT_APP_NAME; Preferences for &TERMUX_FLOAT_APP_NAME; app
&TERMUX_TASKER_APP_NAME; Preferences for &TERMUX_TASKER_APP_NAME; app
&TERMUX_WIDGET_APP_NAME; Preferences for &TERMUX_WIDGET_APP_NAME; app
About
Donate
Update available Download Dismiss Back Gateway Stopped Gateway started Failed to start gateway Gateway starting Gateway stopped Failed to stop gateway Restarting gateway Gateway restarted Failed to restart gateway Restarting gateway for model change Gateway restarted successfully Check OpenClaw updates Loading versionsâ€?/string> View log Open Web UI Opening Web UI Opening Web UI (%1$d/%2$d) Uptime: %1$s Loaded %1$d models from OpenClaw First interaction can take 2-3 minutes while the agent warms up. Gateway issue detected Channels đź“± Telegram Telegram â—?Connected â—?â€?/string> đź’¬ Discord Discord đź“¨ Feishu Feishu Current Model Change Model â–?Start âŹ?Stop đź”„ Restart Backup Restore đź’ˇ Tip Chat with BotDrop on your connected channel to configure more settings, add channels, or change models. SSH Access ssh -p 8022 %1$s\nPassword: %2$s đź–Ą Open Terminal Welcome to BotDrop BotDrop needs two permissions to run your AI gateway reliably in the background. Notifications Show gateway status and alerts Enabled Allow Granted Background Running Keep gateway alive when app is in background Advanced Background Settings Recommended: set Battery to Unrestricted and allow Background data (some devices throttle by default). Background data is restricted. Enable Unrestricted data usage for BotDrop. Background data is allowed. If it still pauses, set Battery to Unrestricted. If the bot pauses in background, set Battery to Unrestricted and allow Background data. Checking... Open Starting... Continue Check Update Checking installation... đź–Ą Terminal Next Set provider credentials Close Provider ID e.g., moonshot Custom Base URL https://api.example.com/v1 Enter API key Saved keys Cancel Select Model Step 1 Search Search models... Loading models... Retry OpenClaw Gateway Log Copy Stopping gateway Installing update Finalizing Starting gateway Refreshing model list This may take a few minutes Choose Your Agent OpenClaw The AI that actually does things. openclaw.ai Install Versions OpenClaw version manager OwliaBot A leaner, safer crypto-native OpenClaw. owlia.bot Soon â†?Step 2/4 Choose your AI Select an AI model to power your bot AI Model No model selected Select API Key Paste your API key here Toggle visibility e.g. https://api.example.com/v1 Verify & Continue â†?Back Provider Auth Paste your key here Open Browser to Sign In Step 3/4 Connect IM Channels Create a bot on Discord Developer Portal and paste the bot token below. Required steps: 1) Create bot and copy token; 2) Add bot to your server(guild). Bot Token Bot token Guild ID Channel ID Owner ID Open Discord Developers Connect & Start Skip for now Create a Feishu app and bot, then fill in App ID and App Secret below. See setup guide for details. App ID App Secret Feishu User ID (for the next step) ou_xxx... Step 1: Save with only App ID + App Secret.\nStep 2: Message the bot to get your user id (ou_...).\nStep 3: Paste user id here, save, and restart gateway. Open Feishu Console Open @BotDropSetupBot Your AI assistant,\nrunning on your phone. Environment ready Verifying Node.js Setting up environment... Installing OpenClaw This takes about a minute Continue â†?/string> Model badge Provider Name Auth method hint Select provider and choose model BotDrop Update New version detected: v%1$s New version detected: v%1$s\n\nTap for details BotDrop Updates Notifies when a new BotDrop version is available. Gateway Running OpenClaw v%1$s Update available: v%1$s OpenClaw update available: v%1$s â†?v%2$s\n\nA newer OpenClaw version is available.\nWould you like to update now? Checking OpenClaw... Setup required... Channel setup required... Check button unavailable Already up to date No app available to open web links No browser available Service not connected Failed to restore OpenClaw data No OpenClaw data folder available to backup OpenClaw backup created:\n%1$s\nIncludes full .openclaw and botdrop folders. OpenClaw gateway is not running Web UI is still starting. Opened directly; please refresh in browser if needed. Web UI is already opening Connected! Gateway is startingâ€?/string> Service not ready, please try again Failed to start gateway: %1$s Unknown error (exit code: %1$d) Skip %1$s setup? If you skip now, %1$s will remain unconfigured.\nYou can configure channels later from the OpenClaw Web UI. Skip This channel Connectingâ€?/string> Please enter a valid bot token Please enter your App ID Please enter your token Please enter a valid owner ID Please enter your App Secret Please enter a valid guild ID Failed to write configuration OpenClaw Versions Service not connected. Please try again later. No versions available No valid versions found Invalid version format Invalid install version Install %1$s? Installed: %1$s\n\nInstall %2$s? OpenClaw is not installed. Install %1$s? Failed to load version list No versions found Failed to fetch versions Failed to fetch versions (exit %1$s) OpenClaw Version Reset to latest Current install version: %1$s Set to %1$s Pin Pin install version to %1$s? Installing update... Update Failed No update target version Dismissed update: v%1$s Updatingâ€?/string> Install failed: %1$s Updated to v%1$s and refreshing model list... Updated to v%1$s Updated to v%1$s (model cache refresh failed) OpenClaw Gateway Log No custom model list found Invalid model format Failed to update model settings Clipboard unavailable Log copied No backup file found in: %1$s Cannot check for OpenClaw backup because storage permission is not granted. No OpenClaw backup found in: %1$s. Continue with a fresh setup. Restore OpenClaw data before setup? A saved OpenClaw backup was found. Restore will replace current .openclaw folder, then jump to Dashboard. Choose Start from scratch to continue normal setup. Restore data Start from scratch OpenClaw data restored No update available No browser app found Service not available. Please try again. Open Update available A new version is available: v%1$s\n\nGo to update page? 123456789:ABCdefGHI... 123456789 bot-token optional app-id app-secret Open the setup bot to create your Telegram bot and get your User ID. Step 1: Tap Connect & Start with only App ID + App Secret.\nStep 2: Message the setup bot after connect to get your User ID.\nStep 3: Paste the user id here, then tap Connect & Start again. Add custom provider API key is required for this provider Cannot restore OpenClaw backup automatically because storage permission is not granted. You can restore manually later. Base URL changed, please reselect provider and model Provider base URL is required Cached keys Confirm Connected: %1$s Custom provider Custom provider base URL and API key are both required Delete cached key Enter API key for this provider Enter custom base URL Enter credentials for custom provider Failed to load models from OpenClaw, using bundled catalog Failed to load model catalog Failed to parse OpenClaw model output, using bundled catalog Failed to read OpenClaw logs Failed to read OpenClaw logs (exit code: %1$d) Using bundled model catalog Fetch models Installation complete Installation complete: v%1$s Installation failed Invalid API key format Later Leave empty to keep current key Loading models from custom URL... No custom model list found. Please reselect provider and try again. No log output available No model list available No models available for this provider No models returned by custom provider No providers available Failed to open browser Owner ID Preparing next step Provider ID is required Models for %1$s Provider ID already exists Configured Not configured Configured Not configured Restore OpenClaw data? A saved OpenClaw backup was found. Restore now? Search models... Search providers...
